text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To create a turning point in history. That's the
goal Mejiro Ardan and I have set for senior year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tallying up everything I have to do as her trainer
to make that happen is no simple feat.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a mountain of work to do today alone.
And while I don't want to get stranded up that
mountain, I can't afford to idle about at its base
either.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Mejiro Ardan is working extremely hard, making
the most of every single second as she strives to
reach our lofty goal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As her trainer, I have to match that level of
commitment!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fully motivated, I take a seat at my desk!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Hours fly by in a moment...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And I come to a realization just as the sun is
starting to set.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps it's the fatigue from the past few days
catching up with me, but I can barely keep my
eyes open!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Unfortunately... I don't have time... to rest...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Are you feeling all right? You seem to have
nodded off in your chair...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I glance out the window to find it's completely
dark outside!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
You've been hard at work all this time, yes? You
have my appreciation.
choice_data_list: I was asleep when you found me, though...
I was asleep when you found me, though...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hehe. And what a precious sight it was to see.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Perhaps you'd consider turning in for today?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
While you have displayed an extraordinary
degree of motivation recently, you also appear to
be overexerting yourself...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Compared to the effort Mejiro Ardan is putting in
right now, there's no way the work I'm doing can
be considered overexertion. I try to explain that
to her but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: No, you're working far too hard.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her expression is gentle, but the blunt truth in her
words hits me like a truck.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...In the time we've known one another, I've never
before seen you so tired that you've fallen asleep
at your desk.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And for your nodding off to be so instantaneous
that you didn't even realize it was happening... I
simply cannot overlook this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Trainer, you said that you would step in and stop me if I went too far. Do you not see a problem with yourself being in this state?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: And with that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Happy Valentine's Day, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Judging by that reaction, I think it's safe to
assume you were so focused on work that you
forgot what day it is today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
These are for all you do on my behalf... Thank
you so very much.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I made them myself, so you might notice some
imperfections here and there, but I hope you'll
enjoy them while you rest today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan's handmade chocolates are so
beautiful they'd look at home on a department
store shelf.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I place one in my mouth. The gentle, snowy
texture dances across my tongue as subtly sweet
tones spread through my mouth.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...What do you think of the taste?
choice_data_list: It's so delicious... I feel so much warmth...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Goodness! It's truly an honor to hear that from
you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
A cup of tea might go nicely with those. I'll just
prepare you some. Please enjoy the chocolates
while I get it ready.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bathed in the light of Mejiro Ardan's kindness, I
swear on my heart that I'm going to stop pushing
myself so hard—for her sake and mine...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Trai... ...ake... ...ease.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Are you awake now?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The ceiling of my office and Mejiro Ardan peering
at me—these are the first things my bleary eyes
register.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
You were sleeping face-down on your desk.
Presumptuous as it may have been, I moved you
into this position so you wouldn't wake up with
muscle cramps.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that's when I come to the realization that my
head is resting on Mejiro Ardan's lap.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Springing straight up like that is dangerous.
Besides, you still appear quite exhausted, so I
think you'd better rest a little more.
choice_data_list: But I still have work to do...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
You've been hard at work all this time, yes? You
have my appreciation.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Perhaps you'd consider turning in for today?
You've clearly been overexerting yourself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Compared to the effort Mejiro Ardan is putting in
right now, there's no way the work I'm doing can
be considered overexertion. I try to explain that
to her but—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: No, you're working far too hard.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her expression is gentle, but the blunt truth in her
words hits me like a truck.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...In the time we've known one another, I've never
before seen you so tired that you've fallen asleep
at your desk.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And for your nodding off to be so instantaneous
that you didn't even realize it was happening... I
simply cannot overlook this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Trainer, you said that you would step in and stop me if I went too far. Do you not see a problem with yourself being in this state?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: And with that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Happy Valentine's Day, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Judging by that reaction, I think it's safe to
assume you were so focused on work that you
forgot what day it is today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
These are for all you do on my behalf... Thank
you so very much.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I made them myself, so you might notice some
imperfections here and there, but I hope you'll
enjoy them while you rest today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan's handmade chocolates are so
beautiful they'd look at home on a department
store shelf.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I place one in my mouth. The gentle, snowy
texture dances across my tongue as subtly sweet
tones spread through my mouth.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...What do you think of the taste?
choice_data_list: It's so delicious... I feel so much warmth...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Goodness! It's truly an honor to hear that from
you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...I imagine your exhaustion is enhancing the
sugary taste.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
As you've hardly had any time to unwind lately,
perhaps you might like to relax a little more while
you enjoy those chocolates.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
There's plenty of space on my lap... should you
need somewhere to rest.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I'll allow you to infer whether that was a
serious offer or not, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Mejiro Ardan's proposal takes me by
surprise, it's one that clearly conveys her
kindness...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I swear on my heart that I'm going to stop pushing
myself so hard—for her sake and mine...
